title: Invariant tori for a class of affined Anosov mappings with quasi-periodic forces
summary: In this paper, we consider a class of affined Anosov mappings with quasi-periodic forces, and show that there is a unique positive integer $m$, which only depends on the system, such that the exponential growth rate of the cardinality of invariant tori of degree $m$ is equal to the topological entropy.
